summary: Comprehensive testing completed for BITZ Club system updates. All major features are working: Landing page with lead capture, Admin leads management, Referral ID integration in members system, and WhatsApp integration. Backend APIs are 100% functional, frontend UI is working properly with all integrations.

design_issues.issue: Chart components showing width/height warnings in console

passed_tests: Backend API comprehensive test (30/30 tests passed - 100% success rate)
Landing page loads correctly at /landing with hero section
All 10 lifestyle experience cards display properly
Lead capture form submission works and stores in database
WhatsApp integration links to correct number (wa.me/7812901118)
Admin login and authentication works correctly
Admin leads page displays leads from landing page submissions
Leads filtering and export functionality works
Members page shows Referral ID column in table
Referral ID filter works on members page
Reports page includes Referral ID filter and column
Excel export functionality works for both leads and members
Referral ID field works in member creation (backend tested)
All admin navigation and dashboards load correctly
